_meta.priceConvention: priceCents is integer Australian cents. null = 'ask staff' / variable / not yet confirmed.
_meta.schemaTarget: Matches Prisma model Product in PROJECT_BRIEF.md §5
notes: Descriptions are 1-2 sentences - sensory, concrete, briefly explain Bengali items for non-Bengali customers. Edit freely in admin.
Firni, Baklava, Tuna Patty and Vegetable Patty are present on the owner's current WooCommerce site and are included here.
Featured items (isFeatured=true) are suggestions for the homepage carousel - owner should confirm.
sortOrder is per-category (1-indexed) - products render in this order within their section.
All imagePath values are null - images will be uploaded by owner via admin panel. See IMAGE_STRATEGY in repo root.

products.name: Chicken Patty
products.description: Golden flaky pastry filled with seasoned minced chicken and onions. Baked fresh, best served warm.

products.name: Paneer Patty
products.description: Crumbled paneer, mild spices and fresh herbs wrapped in our signature buttery short-crust pastry.

products.name: Beef Patty
products.description: Hand-minced beef, black pepper and onion in a flaky golden pastry. Straight-from-the-oven favourite.

products.name: Tuna Patty
products.description: Flaky pastry filled with spiced tuna and herbs. A lighter take on our bestselling patty.

products.name: Vegetable Patty
products.description: Seasoned mixed-veg filling in buttery pastry - the vegetarian patty favourite.

products.name: Chicken Sandwich
products.description: Two slices of soft bread with creamy chicken filling and lettuce. Simple, proper, made fresh.

products.name: Tuna Sandwich
products.description: Tuna mayo with a hint of dill and cracked pepper on soft bread. An easy everyday lunch.

products.name: Small Burger
products.description: Mini beef patty, melted cheese, lettuce and house sauce in a toasted milk bun.

products.name: Prawn Roll
products.description: Hand-rolled pastry with prawns, onion and a light curry spice. Crisp outside, juicy inside.

products.name: Chicken Roll
products.description: Thin bread wrap filled with spiced shredded chicken and fried onion. A Bengali-style street-food classic.

products.name: Beef Roll
products.description: Soft wrap filled with minced beef, green chilli and coriander. Subtly spiced, always warm.

products.name: Samosa
products.description: Triangular pastry parcels of spiced potato, peas and cumin. Ask for tamarind chutney on the side.

products.name: Veg Singara
products.description: Bengali-style savoury pastry with spiced potato and cauliflower - smaller and crunchier than a samosa.

products.name: Liver Singara
products.description: Classic Bengali singara with rich chicken-liver filling. A house specialty - the regulars know.

products.name: Piyaju
products.description: Deep-fried lentil and onion fritters with green chilli. Crisp, savoury, perfect with a cup of cha.

products.name: Dal Puri
products.description: Puffed flatbread stuffed with spiced yellow lentils. Soft, golden, great on its own or with curry.

products.name: Mughlai Paratha
products.description: Hand-layered paratha stuffed with egg, minced meat and onion. A filling Bengali-Mughal classic.

products.name: Popcorn Chicken
products.description: Bite-size chicken pieces in our seasoned crispy batter. Ask staff for current portion and pricing.

products.name: Swiss Short Bread (2 pcs)
products.description: Buttery, crumbly shortbread baked to a pale gold. Two pieces per pack - pairs perfectly with tea.

products.name: Salty Cookies · Nimki
products.description: Crisp, flaky diamond-cut savoury biscuits with black seeds. A Bengali tea-time essential.

products.name: Butter Bun
products.description: Soft enriched milk bun brushed with butter and lightly glazed. Warm, pillowy, gently sweet.

products.name: Cream Roll
products.description: Flaky pastry horn filled with fresh whipped vanilla cream. A classic European treat.

products.name: Kaza
products.description: Traditional Bengali crisp-fried sweet bread dusted with sugar. Crunchy, light, moreish.

products.name: Fruit Cake
products.description: Rich butter cake studded with glacé fruits, raisins and walnuts. Available by slice or whole - ask staff.

products.name: Baklava
products.description: Layered filo pastry with honey and pistachios. A Middle-Eastern classic, baked on rotation.

products.name: Patishapta
products.description: Thin Bengali crepe rolled around sweet coconut and date-palm jaggery filling. A seasonal specialty.

products.name: Pakon Pitha
products.description: Golden fried rice-flour pastry dipped in jaggery syrup. A winter-festival classic from Bengal.

products.name: Narikel Puli
products.description: Half-moon dumplings filled with sweet grated coconut and jaggery, pan-fried to caramelised gold.

products.name: Laddu - 3 varieties
products.description: Besan, motichur and coconut laddu - our three-way sampler of India's most-loved sweet.

products.name: Monsor
products.description: Delicate Bengali milk-sweet moulded into soft, lightly sweetened diamonds. Ask about today's flavour.

products.name: Kodom
products.description: Round milk-sweet rolled in khoya and finished with saffron. Named for the kadam flower it resembles.

products.name: Balu Shai
products.description: Flaky fried dough rings soaked in sugar syrup. Crisp edges, soft centre, uniquely layered.

products.name: Aflaton
products.description: Traditional Bangladeshi sweet of slow-cooked milk, sugar and ghee. Rich, fudge-like, nutty finish.

products.name: Pera
products.description: Khoya-based milk fudge, lightly flavoured with cardamom. Smooth, not too sweet, made in small batches.

products.name: Bondia
products.description: Bite-size pearls of gram-flour in sugar syrup, sometimes shaped into laddu. Ask staff for current stock.

products.name: Halwa - Chana Dal & Hazelnut
products.description: Slow-cooked split-chickpea halwa finished with roasted hazelnuts. Earthy, nutty, comfort in a bowl.

products.name: Chana Mukhi
products.description: Bengali paneer-based sweet shaped into soft, syrup-soaked cubes. A richer, denser take on the classic.

products.name: Rasgulla
products.description: Spongy chenna balls in light cardamom-scented sugar syrup. The quintessential Bengali sweet.

products.name: Cham Cham
products.description: Oval chenna sweets in thick syrup, often topped with khoya or coconut. Soft, silky, indulgent.

products.name: Rosmalai
products.description: Chenna patties in saffron-cardamom-thickened milk, topped with chopped pistachio. Served chilled.

products.name: Hafsa
products.description: House specialty milk-sweet, layered and richly set. A Swiss Bakery signature - try once, order again.

products.name: Firni
products.description: Slow-cooked fragrant rice pudding with milk, cardamom and rose. Chilled, creamy - our signature dessert.

products.name: Malai Cha - small cup
products.description: Rich boiled milk tea with malai cream on top. The perfect pairing for any savoury pastry.

products.name: Poro Roti
products.description: Crisp, flaky paper-thin flatbread - torn and eaten with cha. A Bengali tea-time tradition.

products.name: Buttered Corn
products.description: Sweet corn kernels warmed through with butter and a pinch of salt. A simple, satisfying side.
